# GitHub Copilot Instructions

- Follow `AGENTS.md` for repository-wide rules.
- Treat this repo as a public personal skill toolbox with an agent-neutral source model.
- Put skill-specific business rules in `skills/<skill-name>/SKILL.md`, not in repo-level docs.
- Use sanitized, public-safe example values in all generated content.
- For new skills, follow `docs/add-a-skill.md`. For Codex packaging changes, follow `docs/codex.md`.
